MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

Mtn For Mental Examination & Health Records Of Pltf & For Sanctions; Req For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Klimenko for defendant and moving party: Verasadki Sae-Ung and Sumalee Sae-Ung
David S. Semel for plaintiff and opposing party: Pat Prachayawijit

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted:
Defendant's motion for a mental examination and to compel plaintiff's authorization for release of records is granted in part and denied in part

The motion to compel plaintiff to execute an authorization for release of records is denied. However, the Court will order that the documents referenced in the subpoena attached to the motion as Exhibit E be produced as defendant has established good cause. The records are to be produced on or before October 27, 2005.

The motion for a mental examination is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to submit to testing and an examination by Dr. Bernard Rappaport M.D. on a date mutually convenient to the parties. The examination is to be completed by October 28, 2005.

The request for monetary sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VERASAKDI SAE-UNG, SUMALEE SAE-UNG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: David S. Semel, Esq., 415-391-6182 of Colombatto, Klimenko & Rosse for Defendant and Moving Party; Lawrence John Koncz, 397-9212, Law Offices of John Koncz, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party.
RULING: Argued and the Court Denied the Motion for Summary Judgment. Moving Party failed to shift the burden re malice related to punitives. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
